phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il posteggio dei taxi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel poh-STEHJ-joh day-ee TAHK-see, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Outside the arrivals exit, on the right.

responses.english: Outside the arrivals exit, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è il treno per il centro, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH eel TREH-noh per eel CHEN-troh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua le indicazioni per la stazione.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR LAH stah-tsee-OH-neh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the station.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the station.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR LAH stah-tsee-OH-neh
responses.french: Segua le indicazioni per la stazione.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si fa il check-in, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see fah eel CHECK-in, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the monitors.

responses.english: It is indicated on the monitors.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, la navetta è disponibile adesso, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, lah nah-VET-tah eh dee-spo-NEE-bee-leh ah-DES-soh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa la navetta, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh KOH-stah lah nah-VET-tah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il negozio duty free, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel neh-GOHT-syo DUTY FREE, per fah-VOH-reh
